seo.description: Model the financial impact of standardized falls screening for your organization. Segment-aware calculator with emailable report. Takes two minutes.

blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Clinician reviewing assessment results on tablet
blocks.headline: Model the financial impact of standardized falls screening.
blocks.subtitle: Segment-aware. Two minutes. Emailable report. See how much you could save by reducing one fall per branch per month.

blocks.heading: Quantify the cost of falls in your organization.
blocks.promoBody: Every fall costs money: direct care, liability exposure, staff time, resident turnover, lost referrals. The Able Care ROI calculator models the financial impact of standardized screening against your setting, your branch count and your current falls rate. Share the results with procurement, the board or your PE sponsor.

stats.label: Average cost per fall
stats.sublabel: Direct and indirect costs in senior living

stats.label: Typical payback period
stats.sublabel: Based on one reduced fall per branch per month

blocks.heading: What operators say about the ROI

testimonials.quote: It paid for itself in the first quarter. The ROI case was straightforward once we had the numbers.
We showed the board a two-minute model and got budget approval the same week.
The calculator helped us quantify what we already knew: prevention is cheaper than response.

blocks.heading: Ready to build your business case?
blocks.bodyText: Open the calculator or book a demo to see Able Assess in your workflow.
